chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Transfer Application No.63 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 04.08.2025 Ms. Farzana Mateen, advocate for applicant Mr. Zahoor Shah, APG ----- By consent this transfer application is allowed. The Special Case No.282/2023, Special Case No.351/2023 and Special Case No.351-A/2023 are withdrawn from XX-Anti-Terrorism Court, Karachi and are transferred to the Court of learned XIII-Anti-Terrorism Court, Karachi for disposal according to law. This Cr. Transfer Application is disposed of. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
